title: Manufacturing Company Setup
metaDescription: Manufacturing setup and operations outsourcing in Vietnam — site selection, company formation, FDI compliance and ongoing HR, tax and accounting support.

hero.title: Manufacturing Setup & Business Operations Outsourcing in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Our manufacturing setup and outsourcing services are designed to optimize production processes and reduce operational costs.

sections.heading: From factory site to full operations
body: Setting up a manufacturing operation in Vietnam involves far more than registering a company. InCorp Vietnam covers the full lifecycle — pre-establishment consultation on regulatory frameworks, factory site inspection and selection, company formation with FDI compliance reporting, and the setup of HR, payroll and accounting operations.
Once you are up and running, our ongoing legal, tax and HR advisory keeps your plant compliant and efficient as it scales.

items.title: Initial consultation
items.desc: Advisory on establishment and the regulatory frameworks that apply to your project.

items.title: Factory tour & site selection
items.desc: Inspect and select the right industrial site for your operations.

items.title: Company setup
items.desc: Manufacturing company formation with HR, payroll and accounting support.

items.title: Ongoing compliance
items.desc: Monthly compliance, HR, accounting and tax advisory to keep operations smooth.

sections.heading: Why set up manufacturing with InCorp
items: Comprehensive legal and tax guidance on corporate income tax, incentives and transfer pricing
Investment and financial insights on investment rules and asset capitalization
Labor law and workplace safety compliance support

sections.heading: Vietnam's manufacturing advantages
items: A 10% tax rate for 15 years for qualifying high-tech and infrastructure projects
A 2-year tax exemption plus a 4-year 50% reduction available
Access to industrial zones and free trade zones
Strategic location in APAC's fastest-growing economy

sections.title: Build your manufacturing base in Vietnam
sections.subtitle: From site selection to ongoing compliance, our experts handle it end to end.
